findings.title: buildRecentApps nested conditionals can be flattened
findings.description: buildRecentApps() has 3 levels of nesting (method body > for-loop > if > if). The inner break-condition can be moved to the loop guard or use a continue to flatten one level. This is at the project's observed max nesting depth (2 levels typical).

findings.title: ActivityState duplicates 5 fields from ActivityContext
findings.code_snippet:
export interface ActivityState {
  currentApp: string
  currentWindowTitle: string
  isActive: boolean
  continuousWorkDurationMs: number
  ...
}
findings.description: ActivityState shares 5 of its 7 fields with ActivityContext (currentApp, currentWindowTitle, continuousWorkDurationMs, lastActivityTimestamp, isFullscreen). If ActivityContext changes, ActivityState must be updated manually in lockstep. This is a minor DRY concern for type definitions.
findings.suggestion:
BEFORE:
export interface ActivityState {
  currentApp: string
  currentWindowTitle: string
  isActive: boolean
  continuousWorkDurationMs: number
  recentApps: string[]
  lastActivityTimestamp: number
  isFullscreen: boolean
}

AFTER:
export interface ActivityState extends ActivityContext {
  isActive: boolean
  recentApps: string[]
}

WHY: Eliminates 5 duplicate field declarations. Changes to shared fields (e.g., adding units to continuousWorkDurationMs) automatically propagate. The relationship between the two types becomes explicit in the type hierarchy.

positive_observations: All functions are short (under 20 lines) with clear single responsibilities
Named constants for all default values (DEFAULT_AGGREGATION_INTERVAL_MS, etc.) instead of magic numbers
Early return guard clause in getState() for empty-events case keeps the happy path flat
Constructor uses nullish coalescing for defaults -- concise and readable
ActivityMonitor class follows Imperative Shell pattern correctly (manages timer state, IO callbacks)
Test file uses a well-designed makeEvent() factory helper to reduce boilerplate without hiding intent
Maximum cyclomatic complexity across all functions is approximately 4 (buildRecentApps) -- well within acceptable thresholds
